annotation_target.structure: Return — harmonic settling, approach to F major stability
teaching_goals: feel the harmonic journey returning home
style_tips: softer than the excursion — the tension is releasing

teaching_notes.note: The return to stability: breathe, slow slightly, prepare for the next period.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 13–16 of Traumerei (Dreaming) from Kinderszenen (continuation of mm. 9–12), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 13–16 and describe the return to F major.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 13–16.
Measures 13–16 return toward F major stability, completing the middle section's journey. The music settles and breathes after the harmonic wandering. Let me loop mm. 13–16.
Schumann Traumerei mm. 13–16: return from harmonic excursion, settling to stability. Pairs with mm. 9–12.

eval_metadata.split_strategy: stratified by (composer, composition_id) with MIDI byte-hash dedup
